2605.29421.title: Learning Design Skills as Memory Policies for Agentic Photonic Inverse Design
2605.29421.paper_summary: Photonic crystal fiber (PCF) inverse design remains challenging because candidate geometries must satisfy coupled optical targets under expensive electromagnetic simulation. Existing pipelines improve surrogate prediction or one-shot parameter recommendation, but they do not accumulate reusable design knowledge across iterative trials. We formulate PCF inverse design as a memory-policy learning problem and propose SkillPCF, a closed-loop agent framework that combines a physics-guided memory skill bank, reinforcement-learned skill selection, and simulator-grounded skill evolution. We further construct a real-world dataset with 479 expert interaction traces (2,507 spans) and 553 memory-dependent evaluation queries covering dispersion engineering, loss optimization, and multi-objective design. Experiments across multiple LLM backbones and classical baselines show that SkillPCF achieves stronger design-quality and efficiency trade-offs under practical simulation budgets, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed memory-skill learning paradigm for physics-aware PCF inverse design.
2605.29421.paper_summary_zh: 光子晶體光纖 (PCF) 的反向設計仍然具有挑戰性，因為候選幾何形狀必須在昂貴的電磁模擬下滿足耦合的光學目標。現有的流程改善了替代預測或一次性參數推薦，但它們並未在迭代試驗中積累可重用的設計知識。我們將 PCF 反向設計公式化為一個記憶政策學習問題，並提出了 SkillPCF，一個閉環代理框架，結合了物理引導的記憶技能庫、強化學習的技能選擇以及基於模擬的技能演變。我們進一步構建了一個現實世界數據集，包含 479 個專家互動痕跡 (2,507 個跨度) 和 553 個記憶依賴的評估查詢，涵蓋了色散工程、損失優化和多目標設計。在多個 LLM 骨幹和經典基準上的實驗顯示，SkillPCF 在實際模擬預算下實現了更強的設計質量和效率權衡，證明了我們提出的記憶技能學習範式在物理感知的 PCF 反向設計中的有效性。
2605.29421.author: Shengchao Chen et.al.
2605.29421.authors: Shengchao Chen, Ting Shu, Sufen Ren
